"Sometimes we’ll have a lot of the ball and we’ve got to try and break teams down, other times we’ll attack from deep and be a bit more in transition because you’re defending a bit more.

arts.ttl: Regis Le Bris' Lorient example as boss weighs in on the Sunderland-Middlesbrough derby debate
arts.sum: Asked ahead of Boro's visit if he believed the game was a derby match, the Sunderland boss said: "When we played against local teams at Lorient, we had a specific derby against Brest but we played against Nantes, Rennes, Angers. Regis Le Bris was asked to weigh in on the Sunderland-Middlesbrough derby debate ahead of Saturday's clash at the Stadium of Light - with the Black Cats boss mentioning Newcastle United and making a comparison to his routes in France.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's Josh Coburn plan revealed with Michael Carrick hope after Millwall injury
arts.sum: Josh Coburn will be staying at Millwall for his injury recovery, with Michael Carrick hoping he will be back on the pitch as soon as possible. With Tommy Conway signed from Bristol City this summer, Boro chiefs made the decision to send the 21-year-old out on loan in order to get game-time, for his body to develop the robustness to handle playing regular senior football.

arts.ttl: Exciting Middlesbrough fitness update on Liverpool loanee Ben Doak after Scotland observation
arts.sum: Back on Teesside, however, with plenty of clamour to see the deadline-day signing given his potential to change games for Boro, Carrick is confident that Doak is physically ready. Michael Carrick believes Liverpool loanee Ben Doak is physically ready to go whenever Middlesbrough need him.
